name: Chicken and Mushroom Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Dried thyme or more to taste
4 Boneless chicken breasts; cut into sixths or eighths
3/4 cup Sun-dried tomatoes in oil; chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of the olive oil in a large skillet.
2. Add shallots and mushrooms, and sauté for about 2 minutes.
3. Add red pepper, zucchini, and 1 teaspoon thyme. Sauté until vegetables are just barely tender (about 2 more minutes).
4. Remove from skillet and keep warm.
5. Add remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil to the skillet.
6. Add chicken and remaining 1 teaspoon thyme; sauté until chicken is cooked through, about 12-15 minutes.
7. Remove chicken and combine with vegetables.
8. To juices in skillet, add balsamic vinegar. Cook for a minute, stirring up any browned particles clinging to the pan's bottom.
9. Return chicken and vegetables to pan along with chopped sun-dried tomatoes.
10. Toss together for a minute or two to blend flavors.
11. Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.
